title: Oracle
subTitle: Enterprise SQL and stored procedures
overviewContent: During my time at PNDPS I built and maintained Java/Oracle enterprise systems across the full SDLC, from relational database design through implementation and testing. I wrote and tuned complex SQL queries and stored procedures supporting mission-critical operations in the manufacturing sector.

relatedProjects.projectName: Product Lifecycle Management in Hyundai Mobis
Traffic Information System in Korea Expressway Corporation
